strategy: He summons a random-school minion (each also hits for 500) every other round whenever there is an open slot, so the board keeps refilling. Bring AoE to clear minions and boss together.
Hit with Storm - he takes 30% more from Storm and resists Myth 73%.
Do not kill him on a round he just summoned a minion into an open slot - that fresh minion can take his place. Clear the minions, then finish him, ideally with one AoE that wipes the whole board.
Funnel blades to one hitter and keep the team shielded against the assorted 500-damage minion hits.
Keeping slots filled with weakened minions between AoEs limits how often he can summon a fresh one.
cheatNotes: Round 1 and every other round he summons a random-school minion into any open slot; each summon also deals 500 damage.
"Ice" summon: casts Ice Ninja Pigs for 500 Ice and, if a slot is open, summons an Ice Ninja Pig.
"Life" summon: Life Cyclops for 500 Life, plus a Life Cyclops minion if there is room.
"Storm" summon: Storm Medusa for 500 Storm, plus a Storm Medusa if there is room.
"Fire" summon: Fire Bloodbat for 500 Fire, plus a Fire Bloodbat if there is room.
"Death" summon: Death Troll for 500 Death, plus a Death Troll if there is room.
"Balance" summon: Balance Minotaur for 500 Balance, plus a Balance Minotaur if there is room.
The last minion summoned can replace Stokes if he is killed the same round. Wipe the board with AoE or do not kill him right after a summon.
